data.description:

The latest announcement is out from Faircourt Gold Income A ( (TSE:FGX) ).

Faircourt Asset Management Inc., as manager and investment advisor to Faircourt Gold Income Corp., has declared a monthly cash distribution of $0.034 per share for the fund, which trades on CBOE Canada under the ticker FGX. The distribution will be paid on April 14, 2026 to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2026, reinforcing the fund’s income-oriented mandate for investors seeking regular cash flow from a gold-focused investment vehicle.

The announcement underscores Faircourt’s ongoing commitment to providing consistent monthly distributions through its listed fund structure, although investors are reminded that fund units trade on an exchange and may deviate from net asset value, and that investment funds carry ongoing fees, fluctuating values, and no guarantee of future performance.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:FGX) stock is a Hold with a C$2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Faircourt Gold Income A stock, see the TSE:FGX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FGX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FGX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by erratic fundamentals (negative revenue in 2023–2024, large earnings swings, and weaker/volatile cash flow in 2024) and weak/unstable technical signals. These risks are partly offset by a conservative leverage profile and very attractive headline valuation (low P/E and ~4.9% yield).

To see Spark’s full report on FGX stock, click here.

More about Faircourt Gold Income A

Faircourt Asset Management Inc. is a Canadian investment management firm that serves as investment advisor and manager to Faircourt Funds, including Faircourt Gold Income Corp., which trades on CBOE Canada under the symbol FGX and provides investors with gold-focused income strategies through a listed investment fund structure.

data.title: Vertiqal Studios Warns of Delay in 2025 Annual Filings, Seeks Management Cease Trade Order
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Wondr Gaming Corp ( (TSE:VRTS) ) is now available.

Vertiqal Studios Corp. has warned investors it expects to miss the March 31, 2026 deadline for filing its audited 2025 annual financial statements, MD&A, and related CEO and CFO certificates, citing the complexity of valuing assets and entities acquired from Enthusiast Gaming Holdings Inc. and the involvement of a new audit partner and team. The company has applied for a management cease trade order, which would restrict trading by insiders but allow trading by other investors to continue, and says it expects to complete the filings by April 24, 2026 while remaining compliant with alternative disclosure guidelines, confirming it is not subject to insolvency proceedings and has no undisclosed material information.

Under National Policy 12-203, Vertiqal plans to issue bi-weekly default status reports until the filings are brought up to date, reinforcing transparency for the market during the delay. By seeking a management cease trade order rather than an issuer-wide halt, the company aims to contain the impact of the default primarily to its leadership while signaling that operational and financial conditions remain stable, which may help mitigate broader market concerns about the late filings.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:VRTS) stock is a Hold with a C$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Wondr Gaming Corp stock, see the TSE:VRTS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VRTS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VRTS is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance—heavy losses, ongoing cash burn, and negative equity that elevates financing risk. Technicals are broadly neutral with slightly negative momentum, and valuation provides limited support due to a negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on VRTS stock, click here.

More about Wondr Gaming Corp

Vertiqal Studios Corp. is a digital-channel network and video-production studio that operates North America’s largest gaming and lifestyle network. The company helps global brands reach Gen Z and Millennial audiences with data-driven creative, always-on digital campaigns, and performance-focused distribution across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and Snapchat. Vertiqal manages more than 200 channels, produces over 100 pieces of content daily for a community of more than 52 million followers, and generates revenue through direct brand partnerships, agency relationships, and platform monetization on its owned and operated channels.

Average Trading Volume: 686,933

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$14.34M

Learn more about VRTS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

WCM Global Growth Limited has completed a share placement to professional and sophisticated investors, issuing 25,714,286 new fully paid ordinary shares at $1.75 each. data.title: Oasis Management Raises Stake in Kadokawa to Over 10%, Becomes Major Shareholder
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Kadokawa Corporation ( (JP:9468) ) has shared an announcement.

Kadokawa Corporation has disclosed that Oasis Management Company, an asset manager based in the Cayman Islands, has increased its stake in the company to 10.03% of voting rights, crossing the threshold to become a major shareholder. The change, identified through a large shareholding report filed with the Kanto Local Finance Bureau, reflects a rise from 8.89% as of March 12 to 10.03% as of March 16, although Kadokawa notes it has not independently confirmed the exact number of shares held.

The move strengthens the presence of an activist-style institutional investor on Kadokawa’s share register, potentially increasing shareholder influence over management and capital policy. While the company says it has no specific comments on the impact or future outlook at this stage, the higher stake could signal growing external pressure on governance, strategy and value creation for existing shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9468) stock is a Hold with a Yen3397.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kadokawa Corporation stock, see the JP:9468 Stock Forecast page.

More about Kadokawa Corporation

Kadokawa Corporation is a Japanese media and entertainment group listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market. The company operates across publishing, film, animation, gaming and digital media, leveraging its content portfolio to reach domestic and global audiences through multiple platforms and IP-driven businesses.

Average Trading Volume: 706,926

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

China Electronics Optics Valley Union Holding Co., Ltd. ( (HK:0798) ) has provided an announcement.

China Electronics Optics Valley Union Holding Company Limited has proposed a final ordinary cash dividend of HKD 0.0049 per share for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, subject to shareholder approval on 11 June 2026. The move signals the company’s intention to return cash to investors based on its 2025 performance while maintaining a regular dividend policy.

The dividend will be paid in Hong Kong dollars, with the shares trading ex-dividend on 18 June 2026 and the record date set for 26 June 2026. Eligible shareholders are scheduled to receive payment on 30 October 2026, providing income visibility for investors and underscoring the company’s ongoing engagement with its shareholder base.

data.title: Mercury allocates $250m in oversubscribed seven-year green bond offer
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Mercury NZ ( (MGHTF) ) has issued an announcement.

Mercury NZ Limited, a 100% renewable electricity generator and multi-utility retailer listed on the NZX and ASX, operates across hydro, geothermal and wind generation while also supplying electricity, gas, broadband and mobile services to customers in New Zealand. The company remains majority-owned by the New Zealand Government, which holds at least 51% of its shares.

Mercury has closed the bookbuild for its new seven-year unsecured, unsubordinated fixed-rate green bond issue, allocating $250 million of bonds to participants, including $50 million of oversubscriptions, with no public pool. The issue margin has been set at 0.95% per annum, and the final interest rate will be confirmed later alongside the release of the final terms sheet, marking a successful capital raise to support Mercury’s green financing activities.

More about Mercury NZ

Mercury NZ Limited is a New Zealand-based electricity generator and retailer whose generation assets produce power from 100% renewable sources, including hydro, geothermal and wind. The company also retails electricity, gas, broadband and mobile services, and is dual-listed on the NZX and ASX under the ticker MCY, with the New Zealand Government holding a minimum 51% stake.

data.title: GenFleet Tightens Audit Committee Charter to Bolster Governance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Genfleet Therapeutics (Shanghai), Inc. Class H ( (HK:2595) ) has issued an update.

GenFleet Therapeutics has revised and adopted updated terms of reference for its board Audit Committee, effective 24 March 2026, to enhance governance and oversight. The committee, comprised mainly of independent non-executive directors with accounting or financial expertise, is mandated to supervise audits, internal controls and financial reporting, and to ensure the board can effectively monitor management.

The new terms clarify the committee’s authority over recommending the appointment, reappointment and removal of external auditors, setting their remuneration and managing non-audit services policies. They also formalize requirements on member independence, tenure and professional qualifications, while specifying that the Audit Committee will exercise supervisory functions and coordinate communication between management, internal departments and external auditors to improve transparency and regulatory compliance.

More about Genfleet Therapeutics (Shanghai), Inc. Class H

GenFleet Therapeutics (Shanghai) Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company based in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong. The company operates under a board-led governance structure and is focused on strengthening oversight, audit quality and internal controls in line with the Hong Kong Listing Rules and Chinese corporate law.

data.title: DENSO advances ROHM share acquisition proposal to expand semiconductor reach
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

DENSO ( (JP:6902) ) has shared an update.

DENSO CORPORATION said it has formally submitted a proposal to acquire shares of ROHM Co., Ltd., advancing discussions under their existing semiconductor strategic partnership. The move underscores DENSO’s effort to strengthen its semiconductor capabilities as electrification and digitalization boost chip content and complexity in mobility and related sectors.

The company sees semiconductors as a core technology for addressing social challenges and plans to extend its chip business into industrial equipment and consumer electronics. DENSO believes a deeper collaboration with ROHM, which has strengths in these non‑automotive fields, would broaden its semiconductor footprint, enhance customer value, and reinforce its competitive positioning amid intensifying global chip competition.

DENSO said it will continue “sincere discussions” with ROHM over the proposal and will disclose further details if required. In parallel, it intends to keep pursuing additional third‑party collaborations across the semiconductor value chain to better serve customers and diversify its presence across multiple industries.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:6902) stock is a Hold with a Yen2022.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on DENSO stock, see the JP:6902 Stock Forecast page.

More about DENSO

DENSO CORPORATION is a leading Japanese automotive technology supplier specializing in mobility-related systems and components, including advanced semiconductor solutions. The company focuses on technologies that support vehicle electrification, intelligence, and integration with social infrastructure, aiming to create social value under its “Green and Peace of Mind” principle while expanding into broader industrial and consumer markets.

Average Trading Volume: 7,065,228

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: Yen5132.2B

data.title: Honliv Healthcare Faces Auditor Exit and Probe Over Unrecorded RMB63 Million Loan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Honliv Healthcare Management Group Co Ltd ( (HK:9906) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Honliv Healthcare Management Group has announced the resignation of PricewaterhouseCoopers as its auditor, effective 24 March 2026, after the discovery of an unrecorded RMB63 million bank loan and related payments during the audit of its 2025 financial statements. PwC indicated it lacked sufficient information to complete necessary audit procedures, leading the board to cease providing further materials and to request the firm’s resignation, which may delay the publication of the 2025 annual results.

In response, the company’s audit committee has formed an independent investigation committee comprising its independent non-executive directors to review the unrecorded loan and associated matters. The committee has engaged an independent accounting firm and legal advisors in both mainland China and Hong Kong to define the investigation’s scope, handle regulatory issues, and assess the implications for the group’s financial reporting and governance practices.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:9906) stock is a Hold with a HK$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Honliv Healthcare Management Group Co Ltd stock, see the HK:9906 Stock Forecast page.

More about Honliv Healthcare Management Group Co Ltd

Honliv Healthcare Management Group Company Limited is a healthcare services provider listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The group operates through subsidiaries in mainland China, focusing on medical and hospital management services under a Cayman Islands holding structure.

Average Trading Volume: 19,500

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$936M

See more insights into 9906 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
